title: pouteria dictyoneura subsp. fuertesii
intro: Pouteria dictyoneura subsp. fuertesii, also known as Fuertes' Pouteria or Fuertes Pouteria, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Pouteria dictyoneura subsp. fuertesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Pouteria dictyoneura subsp. fuertesii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
